commands: echo; echo SITE_DIRS:; docker exec $B bash -lc 'cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites; for d in */ ; do if [ -f "$d/site_config.json" ]; then echo "REAL: $d"; else echo "alias/other: $d"; fi; done'

echo; echo DB_PER_SITE:; docker exec $B bash -lc 'cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites; for d in frontend karavanimports.com www.karavanimports.com 44.198.225.186; do echo -n "$d -> "; grep -o "\"db_name\"[^,]*" "$d/site_config.json" 2>/dev/null || echo NO_CONFIG; done'
echo; echo HOST_ROUTING_nginx:; docker exec frappe_docker-frontend-1 sh -lc 'grep -ri server_name /etc/nginx/ 2>/dev/null | head' || echo no-frontend-ctr
echo; echo S3TEST:; aws s3 ls s3://erpnext-prod-clean-20260617a-erpnextbucket-uy3oguk4cgy1/ --region us-east-1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo S3_OK || echo S3_FAIL
